testcase.name: roundtrip toChainId and fromChainId for solana devnet
parseAccount extracts solana mainnet address correctly
toChainId maps tron nile correctly
fromChainId returns null for unknown chain reference
isValidChainId returns true for valid eip155 chain
roundtrip parseAccount and toCaip10
validateChainId returns invalid for non-numeric eip155
validateChainId returns valid for correct tron nile
parseAccount extracts tron nile address correctly
isValidChainId returns true for valid solana chain
validateChainId returns valid for correct solana devnet
roundtrip toChainId and fromChainId for BSC
CaipAccount toCaip10 returns correct format
validateChainId returns invalid for bad namespace
toChainId returns null for unknown network
getEvmNetworkDisplayName returns generic name for unknown chain
getEvmNetworkDisplayName returns Ethereum for chain 1
toChainId maps BSC mainnet correctly
all toChainId outputs are CAIP-2 valid
getEvmNetworkDisplayName returns BSC Testnet for chain 97
toChainId maps Sepolia correctly
parseAccount extracts tron mainnet address correctly
validateChainId returns valid for correct tron mainnet
roundtrip toChainId and fromChainId for tron mainnet
toChainId maps solana mainnet correctly
getEvmNetworkDisplayName returns Sepolia for chain 11155111
toChainId maps Ethereum mainnet correctly
toChainId maps solana devnet correctly
parseAccount returns null for invalid format - no colons
fromChainId returns null for unknown namespace
parseAccount extracts evm BSC address correctly
parseAccount extracts solana devnet address correctly
parseAccount returns null for invalid format - only one colon
validateChainId returns invalid for bad solana reference
validateChainId returns invalid for incorrect format
fromChainId maps solana mainnet correctly
getEvmNetworkDisplayName returns BSC for chain 56
CaipAccount fullChainId returns correct format
validateChainId returns valid for correct eip155
validateChainId returns invalid for non-hex tron
fromChainId maps solana devnet correctly
fromChainId maps Ethereum mainnet correctly
fromChainId returns null for invalid format
parseAccount extracts evm Ethereum address correctly
fromChainId maps BSC mainnet correctly
toChainId returns null for unknown rail
toChainId maps tron mainnet correctly
toChainId maps BSC testnet correctly
isValidChainId returns false for invalid namespace
isValidChainId returns false for invalid format
validateChainId returns valid for correct solana mainnet
parseAccount handles address with colons
parseAccount returns null for empty parts
fromChainId maps tron nile correctly
buildChainId creates correct format
fromChainId maps tron mainnet correctly
